scope_summary: Find one likely later FireFlow submission or progression branch anchored on POST /FireFlow/FireFlowAffApi/NoAuth/CommandsDispatcher, preferably where the action looks like submit, advance, approval, or background workflow rather than login or first-entry traffic. Correlate the same minute across Apache FireFlow or AFF access, aff-boot or nearby FireFlow runtime clues, ms-batch-application.log, ms-configuration.log, PostgreSQL, and ActiveMQ broker log or store evidence. Decide whether the branch stays synchronous or config-centered or whether it rolls into queue-backed background work strongly enough that ActiveMQ should be promoted earlier for this branch. Capture exact timestamps, visible destination names if any, and artifact evidence. Do not mutate appliance state.
